title: blechnum molle
intro: Blechnum molle, also known as the soft chain fern, is a species of fern native to Australia, particularly in the eastern and southern regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Blechnum molle include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Blechnum molle can be made into teas, infusions, and poultices, allowing for various applications in natural medicine.
